title: Telecom company responsible for erroneous debt collection calls
summary: A telecommunications company continued reporting a debt to a credit-reporting agency after the individual was discharged from bankruptcy, harming the individual’s attempt at rebuilding her credit score and resulting in unwanted calls from a debt collection agency. Upon investigation, the telecommunications company corrected its records an...
